company_name: クラリスアート株式会社
hunter_likelihood_reason: Company site lists job placement (職業紹介事業) and worker dispatch services on its official homepage, indicating general recruitment/placement; no headhunting or executive-search keywords present.
notes: Email info@clariceart.co.jp found on official company info page (会社概要). MHLW page confirmed official URL clariceart.co.jp. Company primarily does IT systems development; job placement is a secondary service targeting manufacturing/industrial roles.
